prompt:
A compact celebratory connectivity trophy displayed on a presentation surface, featuring abstract linked-node and repository-inspired geometry instead of any copyrighted mascot or logo. The design should suggest secure syncing and successful integration between systems.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft cinematic lighting, realistic metal and enamel textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the trophy centered and uncluttered.
